---
title: "prexorctl restore"
description: "Apply the named backup bundle"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Apply the named backup bundle. By default both the on-disk filesystem
and the live Mongo + Redis-protocol stores are restored. Use --no-files
or --no-data to scope the restore.
The restore is rejected if the bundle fails verification — run
'prexorctl backup verify <id>' first to see the gap.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl restore <id> [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
--datastores   Restore Mongo and Redis state (default true)
        --dry-run      Validate the bundle and report the planned changes without writing
        --filesystem   Restore the on-disk filesystem entries (default true)
    -h, --help         help for restore
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
